title: Improve man page and --help
body: Should, at least partially, address #134 and #137.

comments.body:
These LGTM.

But I would prefer if we rewrote these all in markdown, so they could easily be displayed on web sites and it would make it easier for people to contribute.

More examples is always helpful also.

> But I would prefer if we rewrote these all in markdown, so they could easily be displayed on web sites and it would make it easier for people to contribute.

Sure, that could be useful; it is not on the critical path for signing, though, so I have filed #151 to track the markdown conversion.

Thanks for the review!
